title: Rise of Supplementaries
description: Rise of Supplementaries, to cage dragons from Isle of Berk mod  A Minecraft mod that integrates the cage and jar elements of the Supplementaries mod.
body:
![RISEOFSPPLEMENTARIES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3da2603bed45d9e8bc6839982b73a467c23f99ac.png)

Rise of Supplementaries is a comprehensive modification that integrates the cage and jar elements of the Supplementaries mod to cage dragons from the Isle of Berk mod into the Minecraft world. This mod gives players the opportunity to experience the unique dragon experience in the HTTYD (How to Train Your Dragon) universe. Players can guard and interact with the dragons they discover and train.

Rise of Supplementaries offers a variety of caging options to create dragons' natural habitats and safely house them. Each dragon species is modeled in detail and available for players to manage, taking advantage of the richness of the Isle of Berk mod. The mod preserves the dragons' unique abilities and behaviors, providing a realistic experience.

Rise of Supplementaries is an ideal option for anyone looking to embark on a dragon-filled adventure in the world of Minecraft. The mod gives players the freedom to create their own dragon trainer story and explore a world full of powerful creatures ruled in a friendly way.

Designed for HTTYD fans, Rise of Supplementaries offers players a fun and emotionally rich experience. With this mod, Minecraft fans can populate their world with dragons and embark on a new adventure with each dragon.
